Book Club (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $68,566,296Details
International Box Office $37,387,336
Worldwide Box Office $105,953,632
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,889,306
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,272,547
Total $9,161,853
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Diane is recently widowed after 40 years of marriage, Vivian enjoys her men with no strings attached, Sharon is still working through her decades-old divorce, and Carol’s marriage is in a slump after 35 years. The lives of these four lifelong friends are turned upside down after reading the infamous “50 Shades of Grey,” catapulting them into a series of outrageous life choices.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,582,231 (19.8% of total gross)
Legs:5.05 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:64.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 10.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,781 opening theaters/3,169 max. theaters, 5.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $90,016,785

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 18th, 2018 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: May 18th, 2018 (Wide), released as Cuando ellas quieren (Mexico)
May 18th, 2018 (Wide), released as Knygų klubas (Lithuania)
May 25th, 2018 (Wide), released as Dámsky klub (Slovakia)
May 25th, 2018 (Wide), released as Dámský klub (Czech Republic)
May 25th, 2018 (Wide) (Poland)
Video Release: August 28th, 2018 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sex-related material throughout, and for language.
(Rating bulletin 2525 (Cert #51545), 5/2/2018)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Franchise: Book Club
Plot point: Autumn Years, Dating After the Death of a Romantic Partner, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Widow/Widower
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: June Pictures, Paramount Pictures, Endeavor Films, Sine Qua Non
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Diane is recently widowed after 40 years of marriage, Vivian enjoys her men with no strings attached, Sharon is still working through her decades-old divorce, and Carol’s marriage is in a slump after 35 years. The lives of these four lifelong friends are turned upside down after reading the infamous “50 Shades of Grey,” catapulting them into a series of outrageous life choices.
